title: Expenses of members
doc_html:
§1352.  Expenses of members

The members of the board shall receive no compensation but shall be paid their necessary and actual expenses incurred in connection with attendance at meetings of the board or on business for the board assigned by it.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 281, §1.
doc_text:
§1352.  Expenses of members
The members of the board shall receive no compensation but shall be paid their necessary and actual expenses incurred in connection with attendance at meetings of the board or on business for the board assigned by it.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 281, §1.
